nodes.label: ExportManifest v1 (mapped frame metadata, no render artifact change)
nodes.rationale: Keeps canonical render artifact unchanged; export manifest is a separate layer so hardware mapping does not contaminate the source render
nodes.norm_label: exportmanifest v1 (mapped frame metadata, no render artifact change)

nodes.label: Deterministic Render ID (render_<hex>)
nodes.rationale: Hash-based from song_id+preset_id+seed+params so same inputs always yield same ID, enabling content addressing and preventing duplicate renders

nodes.label: ChunkedBinaryFrames (progressive ~1.5MB chunks)
nodes.rationale: Splits frame payloads into small chunks stored in data/artifacts/ instead of one monolithic binary to reduce memory pressure and enable streaming playback

nodes.label: Layer Interface (registry-based, seeded render_frame)
nodes.rationale: Registry pattern lets new looks be added without changing renderer control flow; seeded execution guarantees determinism per frame

nodes.label: BlendMode (max, add, alpha, multiply, screen, difference, mask)
nodes.norm_label: blendmode (max, add, alpha, multiply, screen, difference, mask)

nodes.label: Look (nameable visual result of a preset/scene)
nodes.norm_label: look (nameable visual result of a preset/scene)

nodes.label: Spec: Moving Head Math (2D canvas → 3D vector → DMX Pan/Tilt)
nodes.norm_label: spec: moving head math (2d canvas → 3d vector → dmx pan/tilt)

nodes.label: Principle: 100x50 is the Product (intentional constraint)
nodes.rationale: Low resolution is a creative constraint not a limitation; design for bold silhouettes, clean motion, high contrast; avoid soft photographic effects that need high resolution

nodes.label: Principle: Production Grade Definition (musical, legible, varied, deterministic)
nodes.norm_label: principle: production grade definition (musical, legible, varied, deterministic)

nodes.label: Principle: BeatDrop Inspiration (adapt to Python precompute, not clone DirectX)
nodes.rationale: Adapt BeatDrop vocabulary (presets, custom waves, audio-reactive params, transitions) to a Python/Web precompute pipeline instead of copying Windows/DirectX/MilkDrop architecture
nodes.norm_label: principle: beatdrop inspiration (adapt to python precompute, not clone directx)

nodes.label: Spec: Shader-POI Interaction (spawn, collision, pass-thru gravity)
nodes.norm_label: spec: shader-poi interaction (spawn, collision, pass-thru gravity)

nodes.label: Spec: Data Schemas and File Structure
nodes.norm_label: spec: data schemas and file structure

nodes.label: Phase 6 Spec: Quality, Performance, and Packaging
nodes.norm_label: phase 6 spec: quality, performance, and packaging

nodes.label: Phase 3 Spec: Preset and Layer Engine
nodes.norm_label: phase 3 spec: preset and layer engine

nodes.label: Phase 1: Baseline and Contracts
nodes.rationale: Before adding visual complexity, define exactly what a rendered show is, how it is stored, how it is loaded, and how parameter changes are expected to behave

nodes.label: Analysis Schema v1
nodes.rationale: Versioned analysis cache invalidated when analyzer logic changes, ensuring stale analysis is never silently used

nodes.label: Musical Structure
nodes.rationale: Downbeat, phrase, and section candidates are emitted with confidence values so consumers can threshold-gate decisions on signal quality

nodes.label: Parameter Schema
nodes.rationale: Typed parameters with defaults, bounds, step size, and UI grouping allow the frontend to generate parameter editors from schema without hardcoded controls

nodes.label: Undersea Waves Preset
nodes.rationale: 3 layered sine waves restricted to parcan chase effects; wave speed responds to beat timing; wave intensity/glitter modulates on FFT band changes; configurable base color defaulting to blue

nodes.label: Undersea Pulse Preset
nodes.rationale: Baseline migration preset representing current wave plus pulse look to ensure schema continuity with pre-schema rendering

nodes.label: Modulation Mapping Operations
nodes.rationale: Operations (scale, clamp, invert, curve, smooth, lag, quantize) apply in declared order giving preset authors composable signal shaping without custom code

nodes.label: Modulation Preset Bindings
nodes.rationale: Presets bind modulators to layer parameters without custom Python code, keeping show authoring declarative

nodes.label: Variety Metrics
nodes.rationale: Beat-response and section-variation signals flag static or repetitive renders that would fail audience engagement even if technically correct

nodes.label: Render Artifact
nodes.rationale: Versioned schema with schema_version, render_id, preset_id, seed, song_id, analysis_id, fps, duration, frame_count ensures any reader can validate compatibility without implicit assumptions

nodes.label: Chunked Binary Frames v2
nodes.rationale: Split v2 frame payloads into short binary chunks stored in data/artifacts/ instead of one monolithic .bin file to reduce memory pressure and enable progressive loading

nodes.label: Deterministic Seed
nodes.rationale: Explicit and required seed handling ensures the same song, preset, params, and seed always produce identical frames

nodes.label: Layer Interface
nodes.rationale: Registry-based API with deterministic seeded execution allows layers to be discovered by id and renders reproducibly

nodes.label: POI Reference Schema
nodes.rationale: Normalized points of interest with optional per-fixture pan and tilt calibration targeting ref_0_0_0 so moving heads can be aimed at POIs on the canvas

nodes.label: Fixture Reference Schema
nodes.rationale: Fixture instances with fixture-type id and normalized canvas location treat fixtures.json as authoritative real fixture data rather than UI-only annotations

nodes.label: Export Manifest v1
nodes.rationale: Mapped frame metadata is exported separately without modifying the canonical render artifact, preserving artifact immutability

hyperedges.label: Export Processing Chain (pixel mapping → gamma → brightness limiting)
Deterministic Render Pipeline (seed + render_id + preset + scene)
Render Output Quality and Data Contracts
